name: Vicente Fox Quesada
role: President of Mexico (2000–2006), PAN/Alliance for Change
quote: Hoy, México tiene un gobierno que va a actuar con honestidad, con transparencia y que va a erradicar la corrupción. (Today, Mexico has a government that will act with honesty, with transparency and that will eradicate corruption.)

name: Marta Sahagún de Fox
role: Presidential Spokesperson (2000–2001); First Lady (2001–2006); Founder, Vamos México
quote: Mi vocación es la de servir. No soy candidata a la presidencia. (My vocation is to serve. I am not a candidate for the presidency.)

name: Jorge Castañeda Gutman
role: Secretary of Foreign Relations (2000–2003); architect of 'whole enchilada' immigration proposal
quote: We want the whole enchilada — not just tortillas.

name: Santiago Creel Miranda
role: Secretary of the Interior (Gobernación) 2000–2005; PAN presidential primary candidate 2006
quote: La democracia no es solo votar cada seis años, es participación ciudadana todos los días. (Democracy is not just voting every six years; it is citizen participation every day.)

name: Francisco Gil Díaz
role: Secretary of Finance (Hacienda) 2000–2006; achieved historic inflation reduction
quote: La disciplina fiscal es la base de la estabilidad económica. (Fiscal discipline is the foundation of economic stability.)

name: Luis Ernesto Derbez
role: Secretary of Foreign Relations 2003–2006; led Mexico's UN Security Council position against Iraq War
quote: México ha mantenido una política exterior independiente y basada en el derecho internacional. (Mexico has maintained an independent foreign policy based on international law.)

name: Felipe Calderón Hinojosa
role: Secretary of Energy (2003–2004); PAN presidential candidate; President-elect (2006)
quote: Soy el presidente de todos los mexicanos. (I am the president of all Mexicans.)

name: Diego Fernández de Cevallos
role: 'El Jefe Diego' — Senior PAN senator; former 1994 presidential candidate; PAN power broker
quote: La democracia tiene que vivirse en los hechos, no solo en los discursos. (Democracy must be lived in deeds, not just in speeches.)

name: Andrés Manuel López Obrador
role: Head of Government of Mexico City (2000–2006); PRD presidential candidate 2006; declared 'Legítimo Presidente'
quote: No voy a aceptar un fraude electoral. Los votos se respetan. (I will not accept electoral fraud. The votes must be respected.)

name: Cuauhtémoc Cárdenas Solórzano
role: PRD founder; 2000 presidential candidate (16.6%); former Mexico City mayor
quote: La izquierda mexicana tiene que unirse alrededor de un proyecto democrático y de justicia social. (The Mexican left must unite around a democratic and social justice project.)

name: Porfirio Muñoz Ledo
role: PRD veteran politician; former PRI; democratic transition figure; Fox Ambassador to EU (2001–2002)
quote: La transición democrática no se termina con una elección. Es un proceso continuo de transformación. (The democratic transition does not end with one election. It is a continuous process of transformation.)

name: Roberto Madrazo Pintado
role: PRI National Chairman (2002–2005); PRI presidential candidate 2006 (22.3%)
quote: El PRI es el partido de la mayoría de los mexicanos y tiene todo para gobernar México. (The PRI is the party of the majority of Mexicans and has everything needed to govern Mexico.)

name: Ernesto Zedillo Ponce de León
role: Outgoing President (PRI); conceded to Fox on election night; enabled democratic transition
quote: Hoy la democracia ha triunfado. Felicito a Vicente Fox y a todos los mexicanos. (Today democracy has triumphed. I congratulate Vicente Fox and all Mexicans.)

name: Ulises Ruiz Ortiz
role: PRI Governor of Oaxaca (2004–2010); his eviction attempt triggered the APPO uprising of 2006
quote: No voy a renunciar. Soy el gobernador legítimamente electo de Oaxaca. (I will not resign. I am the legitimately elected governor of Oaxaca.)

name: Subcomandante Marcos (Rafael Sebastián Guillén)
role: EZLN military leader; Zapatour march leader 2001; 'La Otra Campaña' 2005–2006
quote: Somos el color de la tierra que lucha. No somos de ningún partido político. (We are the color of the earth in struggle. We do not belong to any political party.)

name: Comandante Esther
role: EZLN commander; first indigenous woman to address the Mexican Congress (March 28, 2001)
quote: Los zapatistas confiamos en que los legisladores no van a confundir la justicia con la caridad. (The Zapatistas trust that legislators will not confuse justice with charity.)

name: George W. Bush
role: US President (2001–2009); Fox's key bilateral counterpart; first foreign trip to Mexico
quote: President Fox and I share a common border, common values, and a common future. The relationship between our two countries is the most important relationship we have.

name: Colin Powell
role: US Secretary of State (2001–2005); Fox's primary US diplomatic counterpart
quote: We are neighbors who share a border of friendship, not suspicion.

name: Fidel Castro
role: President of Cuba (1976–2008); revealed Fox's private request in Monterrey (2002), triggering diplomatic rupture
quote: ¡Come y te vas! (Eat and leave!) — Fox's reported instruction, as revealed by Castro.

name: Rafael Macedo de la Concha
role: Attorney General (Procurador General) 2000–2005; drove AMLO desafuero; resigned Apr 2005
quote: Ningún funcionario está por encima de la ley. El desafuero es un procedimiento constitucional. (No official is above the law. The desafuero is a constitutional procedure.)
